description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a prominent hip roof covered in light beige tiles. The exterior walls are primarily white, accented by large glass windows and wooden trim, giving it a modern yet inviting appearance. A spacious wooden deck extends from the front, leading to a covered porch supported by columns, which adds to the welcoming facade. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a secondary entrance, as well as a long driveway or walkway that connects to the main entrance. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete or brick, with wooden and glass elements for doors, windows, and decking. The overall design is clean and symmetrical, with a focus on open, airy spaces and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, white walls, large glass windows, and a spacious wooden deck with a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the extended wooden deck leading to the covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the hip roof structure, and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the wooden deck.
description_view_3: Opposite end view focusing on the long driveway or walkway leading up to the main entrance and the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
